destinations.evidence: Nodebuilder emits block start/end, phase metrics for registry update/setup/transactions/consensus/finalization, and transaction start/end metrics carrying gas used.

equivalence_argument: The metrics are implemented at the Ritual executor layer that owns the block phases and transaction loop in the current architecture.
rationale: The commit adds ritual-metrics dependencies and wraps each major execution phase and transaction execution with metric logging calls. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: RitualBlockExecutor emits block verification start/end metrics, phase metrics for registry update, setup, transaction processing, consensus verification, and finalization, and per-transaction verification start/end metrics including gas used.
suggested_falsification_tests: Install a test metrics sink or capture structured logs during execute_one on a block with two transactions. Assert one block start and end event, one phase metric for each named phase, and matching tx start/end events for both transaction hashes with the gas value returned by execute_transaction.
summary: Nodebuilder emits block, phase, and per-transaction execution metrics.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Capture ritual_metrics output while executing a two-transaction block and assert each named phase plus tx start/end records are emitted with gas used.
title: Execution emits block and transaction metrics
